001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;

005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;

008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LastBolusStatusV3Request;
013import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog.BolusDeliveryHistoryLog;

015import java.time.Instant;
016import java.util.Set;
017
018/**
019 * Represents the last bolus status, version C. Contains both standard and extended bolus info.
020 *
021 * Binary layout (53 bytes total):
022 *   byte  0      : lastBolusTypeBitmask (uint8, bit0=standard present, bit1=extended present)
023 *   byte  1      : standardBolusStatus  (uint8, BolusStatusC id: 0=INVALID, 3=STOPPING, 4=FINISHED)
024 *   bytes 2-3    : standardBolusId      (uint16 LE)
025 *   bytes 4-5    : unknown/padding      (2 bytes)
026 *   bytes 6-9    : standardBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE, seconds since pump epoch)
027 *   bytes 10-13  : standardBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
028 *   byte  14     : standardBolusEndReason (uint8, BolusEndReason id)
029 *   byte  15     : standardBolusSource    (uint8, BolusSource id)
030 *   byte  16     : standardBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
031 *   bytes 17-20  : standardBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
032 *   bytes 21-24  : standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
033 *   byte  25     : extendedBolusStatus  (uint8, BolusStatusC id)
034 *   bytes 26-27  : extendedBolusId      (uint16 LE)
035 *   bytes 28-29  : unknown/padding      (2 bytes)
036 *   bytes 30-33  : extendedBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE, seconds since pump epoch)
037 *   bytes 34-37  : extendedBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
038 *   byte  38     : extendedBolusEndReason (uint8, BolusEndReason id)
039 *   byte  39     : extendedBolusSource    (uint8, BolusSource id)
040 *   byte  40     : extendedBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
041 *   bytes 41-44  : extendedBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
042 *   bytes 45-48  : extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
043 *   bytes 49-52  : extendedBolusDuration (uint32 LE, seconds)
044 *
045 * Derived from decompiled Tandem Mobi Android app:
046 *   LastBolusStatusV3Response$LastBolusStatusCCargo.java (using C8082b/C8083c dispatch tables)
047 *
048 * Compared to {@link LastBolusStatusV2Response}, this response contains info for both
049 * a standard bolus and an extended bolus, plus secondsSincePumpReset fields.
050 */
051/**
052 * Represents the last bolus status, version C. Contains both standard and extended bolus info.
053 *
054 * Binary layout (53 bytes total):
055 *   byte  0      : lastBolusTypeBitmask (uint8, bit0=standard present, bit1=extended present)
056 *   byte  1      : standardBolusStatus  (uint8, BolusStatusC id: 0=INVALID, 3=STOPPING, 4=FINISHED)
057 *   bytes 2-3    : standardBolusId      (uint16 LE)
058 *   bytes 4-5    : unknown/padding      (2 bytes)
059 *   bytes 6-9    : standardBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE, seconds since pump epoch)
060 *   bytes 10-13  : standardBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
061 *   byte  14     : standardBolusEndReason (uint8, BolusEndReason id)
062 *   byte  15     : standardBolusSource    (uint8, BolusSource id)
063 *   byte  16     : standardBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
064 *   bytes 17-20  : standardBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
065 *   bytes 21-24  : standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
066 *   byte  25     : extendedBolusStatus  (uint8, BolusStatusC id)
067 *   bytes 26-27  : extendedBolusId      (uint16 LE)
068 *   bytes 28-29  : unknown/padding      (2 bytes)
069 *   bytes 30-33  : extendedBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE, seconds since pump epoch)
070 *   bytes 34-37  : extendedBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
071 *   byte  38     : extendedBolusEndReason (uint8, BolusEndReason id)
072 *   byte  39     : extendedBolusSource    (uint8, BolusSource id)
073 *   byte  40     : extendedBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
074 *   bytes 41-44  : extendedBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
075 *   bytes 45-48  : extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
076 *   bytes 49-52  : extendedBolusDuration (uint32 LE, seconds)
077 *
078 * Derived from decompiled Tandem Mobi Android app:
079 *   LastBolusStatusV3Response$LastBolusStatusCCargo.java (using C8082b/C8083c dispatch tables)
080 *
081 * Compared to {@link LastBolusStatusV2Response}, this response contains info for both
082 * a standard bolus and an extended bolus, plus secondsSincePumpReset fields.
083 *
084
085 *
086 * <br>
087 *
088 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LastBolusStatusV3Request}, opCode -69, size 53
089 *
090 * <br>
091 *
092 * 
093 * <table border='1'>
094 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
095 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-69</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
096 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>53</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
097 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
098 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
099 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.LastBolusStatusV3Request}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
100 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>minApi</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models.KnownApiVersion#MOBI_API_V3_5}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
101 * </table>
102 */@MessageProps(
103    opCode=-69,
104    size=53,
105    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
106    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
107    request=LastBolusStatusV3Request.class,
108    minApi=KnownApiVersion.MOBI_API_V3_5
109)
110@ApiVersionDependent
111public class LastBolusStatusV3Response extends Message {
112
113    // lastBolusTypeBitmask: bit 0 = standard bolus present, bit 1 = extended bolus present
114    private int lastBolusTypeBitmask;
115
116    // Standard bolus fields
117    private int standardBolusStatusId;
118    private int standardBolusId;
119    private byte[] standardUnknown;
120    private long standardBolusTimestamp;
121    private long standardBolusDeliveredVolume;
122    private int standardBolusEndReasonId;
123    private int standardBolusSourceId;
124    private int standardBolusTypeBitmask;
125    private long standardBolusRequestedVolume;
126    private long standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
127
128    // Extended bolus fields
129    private int extendedBolusStatusId;
130    private int extendedBolusId;
131    private byte[] extendedUnknown;
132    private long extendedBolusTimestamp;
133    private long extendedBolusDeliveredVolume;
134    private int extendedBolusEndReasonId;
135    private int extendedBolusSourceId;
136    private int extendedBolusTypeBitmask;
137    private long extendedBolusRequestedVolume;
138    private long extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
139    private long extendedBolusDuration;
140
141    public LastBolusStatusV3Response() {}
142
143    public LastBolusStatusV3Response(
144            int lastBolusTypeBitmask,
145            int standardBolusStatusId,
146            int standardBolusId,
147            byte[] standardUnknown,
148            long standardBolusTimestamp,
149            long standardBolusDeliveredVolume,
150            int standardBolusEndReasonId,
151            int standardBolusSourceId,
152            int standardBolusTypeBitmask,
153            long standardBolusRequestedVolume,
154            long standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
155            int extendedBolusStatusId,
156            int extendedBolusId,
157            byte[] extendedUnknown,
158            long extendedBolusTimestamp,
159            long extendedBolusDeliveredVolume,
160            int extendedBolusEndReasonId,
161            int extendedBolusSourceId,
162            int extendedBolusTypeBitmask,
163            long extendedBolusRequestedVolume,
164            long extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
165            long extendedBolusDuration) {
166        this.cargo = buildCargo(
167                lastBolusTypeBitmask,
168                standardBolusStatusId,
169                standardBolusId,
170                standardUnknown,
171                standardBolusTimestamp,
172                standardBolusDeliveredVolume,
173                standardBolusEndReasonId,
174                standardBolusSourceId,
175                standardBolusTypeBitmask,
176                standardBolusRequestedVolume,
177                standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
178                extendedBolusStatusId,
179                extendedBolusId,
180                extendedUnknown,
181                extendedBolusTimestamp,
182                extendedBolusDeliveredVolume,
183                extendedBolusEndReasonId,
184                extendedBolusSourceId,
185                extendedBolusTypeBitmask,
186                extendedBolusRequestedVolume,
187                extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
188                extendedBolusDuration);
189        this.lastBolusTypeBitmask = lastBolusTypeBitmask;
190        this.standardBolusStatusId = standardBolusStatusId;
191        this.standardBolusId = standardBolusId;
192        this.standardUnknown = standardUnknown;
193        this.standardBolusTimestamp = standardBolusTimestamp;
194        this.standardBolusDeliveredVolume = standardBolusDeliveredVolume;
195        this.standardBolusEndReasonId = standardBolusEndReasonId;
196        this.standardBolusSourceId = standardBolusSourceId;
197        this.standardBolusTypeBitmask = standardBolusTypeBitmask;
198        this.standardBolusRequestedVolume = standardBolusRequestedVolume;
199        this.standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset = standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
200        this.extendedBolusStatusId = extendedBolusStatusId;
201        this.extendedBolusId = extendedBolusId;
202        this.extendedUnknown = extendedUnknown;
203        this.extendedBolusTimestamp = extendedBolusTimestamp;
204        this.extendedBolusDeliveredVolume = extendedBolusDeliveredVolume;
205        this.extendedBolusEndReasonId = extendedBolusEndReasonId;
206        this.extendedBolusSourceId = extendedBolusSourceId;
207        this.extendedBolusTypeBitmask = extendedBolusTypeBitmask;
208        this.extendedBolusRequestedVolume = extendedBolusRequestedVolume;
209        this.extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset = extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
210        this.extendedBolusDuration = extendedBolusDuration;
211    }
212
213    @Override
214    /**
215     * <table border="1">
216     * <caption>Parsed fields for LastBolusStatusV3Response:</caption>
217     * <tr><td><code>lastBolusTypeBitmask</code></td><td><code>raw[0] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
218     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusStatusId</code></td><td><code>raw[1] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
219     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 2)</code></td></tr>
220     * <tr><td><code>standardUnknown</code></td><td><code>new byte[]{raw[4], raw[5]}</code></td></tr>
221     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusTimestamp</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 6)</code></td></tr>
222     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusDeliveredVolume</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10)</code></td></tr>
223     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusEndReasonId</code></td><td><code>raw[14] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
224     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusSourceId</code></td><td><code>raw[15] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
225     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusTypeBitmask</code></td><td><code>raw[16] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
226     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusRequestedVolume</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 17)</code></td></tr>
227     * <tr><td><code>standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 21)</code></td></tr>
228     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusStatusId</code></td><td><code>raw[25] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
229     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 26)</code></td></tr>
230     * <tr><td><code>extendedUnknown</code></td><td><code>new byte[]{raw[28], raw[29]}</code></td></tr>
231     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusTimestamp</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 30)</code></td></tr>
232     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusDeliveredVolume</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 34)</code></td></tr>
233     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusEndReasonId</code></td><td><code>raw[38] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
234     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusSourceId</code></td><td><code>raw[39] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
235     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusTypeBitmask</code></td><td><code>raw[40] &amp; 0xFF</code></td></tr>
236     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusRequestedVolume</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 41)</code></td></tr>
237     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 45)</code></td></tr>
238     * <tr><td><code>extendedBolusDuration</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 49)</code></td></tr>
239     * </table>
240     */
241    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
242        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
243        this.cargo = raw;
244        // byte 0: lastBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
245        this.lastBolusTypeBitmask = raw[0] & 0xFF;
246        // byte 1: standardBolusStatus (uint8)
247        this.standardBolusStatusId = raw[1] & 0xFF;
248        // bytes 2-3: standardBolusId (uint16 LE)
249        this.standardBolusId = Bytes.readShort(raw, 2);
250        // bytes 4-5: unknown/padding
251        this.standardUnknown = new byte[]{raw[4], raw[5]};
252        // bytes 6-9: standardBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE)
253        this.standardBolusTimestamp = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 6);
254        // bytes 10-13: standardBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
255        this.standardBolusDeliveredVolume = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 10);
256        // byte 14: standardBolusEndReason (uint8)
257        this.standardBolusEndReasonId = raw[14] & 0xFF;
258        // byte 15: standardBolusSource (uint8)
259        this.standardBolusSourceId = raw[15] & 0xFF;
260        // byte 16: standardBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
261        this.standardBolusTypeBitmask = raw[16] & 0xFF;
262        // bytes 17-20: standardBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
263        this.standardBolusRequestedVolume = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 17);
264        // bytes 21-24: standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
265        this.standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 21);
266        // byte 25: extendedBolusStatus (uint8)
267        this.extendedBolusStatusId = raw[25] & 0xFF;
268        // bytes 26-27: extendedBolusId (uint16 LE)
269        this.extendedBolusId = Bytes.readShort(raw, 26);
270        // bytes 28-29: unknown/padding
271        this.extendedUnknown = new byte[]{raw[28], raw[29]};
272        // bytes 30-33: extendedBolusTimestamp (uint32 LE)
273        this.extendedBolusTimestamp = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 30);
274        // bytes 34-37: extendedBolusDeliveredVolume (uint32 LE)
275        this.extendedBolusDeliveredVolume = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 34);
276        // byte 38: extendedBolusEndReason (uint8)
277        this.extendedBolusEndReasonId = raw[38] & 0xFF;
278        // byte 39: extendedBolusSource (uint8)
279        this.extendedBolusSourceId = raw[39] & 0xFF;
280        // byte 40: extendedBolusTypeBitmask (uint8)
281        this.extendedBolusTypeBitmask = raw[40] & 0xFF;
282        // bytes 41-44: extendedBolusRequestedVolume (uint32 LE)
283        this.extendedBolusRequestedVolume = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 41);
284        // bytes 45-48: extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset (uint32 LE)
285        this.extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 45);
286        // bytes 49-52: extendedBolusDuration in seconds (uint32 LE)
287        this.extendedBolusDuration = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 49);
288    }
289
290    /**
291     * <table border="1">
292     * <caption>Byte layout for LastBolusStatusV3Response.buildCargo(...):</caption>
293     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
294     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) lastBolusTypeBitmask</code></td></tr>
295     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>(byte) standardBolusStatusId</code></td></tr>
296     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(standardBolusId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
297     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(standardBolusId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
298     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusTimestamp) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
299     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusTimestamp) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
300     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusTimestamp) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
301     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusTimestamp) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
302     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
303     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
304     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
305     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
306     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>(byte) standardBolusEndReasonId</code></td></tr>
307     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>(byte) standardBolusSourceId</code></td></tr>
308     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>(byte) standardBolusTypeBitmask</code></td></tr>
309     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
310     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
311     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
312     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
313     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
314     * <tr><td>20</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
315     * <tr><td>21</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
316     * <tr><td>22</td><td><code>toUint32(standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
317     * <tr><td>23</td><td><code>(byte) extendedBolusStatusId</code></td></tr>
318     * <tr><td>24</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(extendedBolusId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
319     * <tr><td>25</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(extendedBolusId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
320     * <tr><td>26</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusTimestamp) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
321     * <tr><td>27</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusTimestamp) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
322     * <tr><td>28</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusTimestamp) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
323     * <tr><td>29</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusTimestamp) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
324     * <tr><td>30</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
325     * <tr><td>31</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
326     * <tr><td>32</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
327     * <tr><td>33</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDeliveredVolume) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
328     * <tr><td>34</td><td><code>(byte) extendedBolusEndReasonId</code></td></tr>
329     * <tr><td>35</td><td><code>(byte) extendedBolusSourceId</code></td></tr>
330     * <tr><td>36</td><td><code>(byte) extendedBolusTypeBitmask</code></td></tr>
331     * <tr><td>37</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
332     * <tr><td>38</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
333     * <tr><td>39</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
334     * <tr><td>40</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusRequestedVolume) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
335     * <tr><td>41</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
336     * <tr><td>42</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
337     * <tr><td>43</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
338     * <tr><td>44</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
339     * <tr><td>45</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDuration) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
340     * <tr><td>46</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDuration) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
341     * <tr><td>47</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDuration) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
342     * <tr><td>48</td><td><code>toUint32(extendedBolusDuration) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
343     * </table>
344     */
345    public static byte[] buildCargo(
346            int lastBolusTypeBitmask,
347            int standardBolusStatusId,
348            int standardBolusId,
349            byte[] standardUnknown,
350            long standardBolusTimestamp,
351            long standardBolusDeliveredVolume,
352            int standardBolusEndReasonId,
353            int standardBolusSourceId,
354            int standardBolusTypeBitmask,
355            long standardBolusRequestedVolume,
356            long standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
357            int extendedBolusStatusId,
358            int extendedBolusId,
359            byte[] extendedUnknown,
360            long extendedBolusTimestamp,
361            long extendedBolusDeliveredVolume,
362            int extendedBolusEndReasonId,
363            int extendedBolusSourceId,
364            int extendedBolusTypeBitmask,
365            long extendedBolusRequestedVolume,
366            long extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset,
367            long extendedBolusDuration) {
368        return Bytes.combine(
369            new byte[]{ (byte) lastBolusTypeBitmask },           // byte 0
370            new byte[]{ (byte) standardBolusStatusId },          // byte 1
371            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(standardBolusId),    // bytes 2-3
372            standardUnknown,                                      // bytes 4-5
373            Bytes.toUint32(standardBolusTimestamp),               // bytes 6-9
374            Bytes.toUint32(standardBolusDeliveredVolume),         // bytes 10-13
375            new byte[]{ (byte) standardBolusEndReasonId },        // byte 14
376            new byte[]{ (byte) standardBolusSourceId },           // byte 15
377            new byte[]{ (byte) standardBolusTypeBitmask },        // byte 16
378            Bytes.toUint32(standardBolusRequestedVolume),         // bytes 17-20
379            Bytes.toUint32(standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset),   // bytes 21-24
380            new byte[]{ (byte) extendedBolusStatusId },           // byte 25
381            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(extendedBolusId),    // bytes 26-27
382            extendedUnknown,                                      // bytes 28-29
383            Bytes.toUint32(extendedBolusTimestamp),               // bytes 30-33
384            Bytes.toUint32(extendedBolusDeliveredVolume),         // bytes 34-37
385            new byte[]{ (byte) extendedBolusEndReasonId },        // byte 38
386            new byte[]{ (byte) extendedBolusSourceId },           // byte 39
387            new byte[]{ (byte) extendedBolusTypeBitmask },        // byte 40
388            Bytes.toUint32(extendedBolusRequestedVolume),         // bytes 41-44
389            Bytes.toUint32(extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset),   // bytes 45-48
390            Bytes.toUint32(extendedBolusDuration)                 // bytes 49-52
391        );
392    }
393
394    /**
395     * Bitmask indicating which bolus types are present.
396     * Bit 0 = standard bolus present, bit 1 = extended bolus present.
397     */
398    public int getLastBolusTypeBitmask() {
399        return lastBolusTypeBitmask;
400    }
401
402    /** @return true if a standard bolus record is present */
403    public boolean isStandardBolusPresent() {
404        return (lastBolusTypeBitmask & 0x01) != 0;
405    }
406
407    /** @return true if an extended bolus record is present */
408    public boolean isExtendedBolusPresent() {
409        return (lastBolusTypeBitmask & 0x02) != 0;
410    }
411
412    // ---- Standard bolus getters ----
413
414    public int getStandardBolusStatusId() {
415        return standardBolusStatusId;
416    }
417
418    public int getStandardBolusId() {
419        return standardBolusId;
420    }
421
422    public long getStandardBolusTimestamp() {
423        return standardBolusTimestamp;
424    }
425
426    public Instant getStandardBolusTimestampInstant() {
427        return Dates.fromJan12008EpochSecondsToDate(standardBolusTimestamp);
428    }
429
430    public long getStandardBolusDeliveredVolume() {
431        return standardBolusDeliveredVolume;
432    }
433
434    public int getStandardBolusEndReasonId() {
435        return standardBolusEndReasonId;
436    }
437
438    public int getStandardBolusSourceId() {
439        return standardBolusSourceId;
440    }
441
442    public BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusSource getStandardBolusSource() {
443        return BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusSource.fromId(standardBolusSourceId);
444    }
445
446    public int getStandardBolusTypeBitmask() {
447        return standardBolusTypeBitmask;
448    }
449
450    public Set<BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusType> getStandardBolusTypes() {
451        return BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusType.fromBitmask(standardBolusTypeBitmask);
452    }
453
454    public long getStandardBolusRequestedVolume() {
455        return standardBolusRequestedVolume;
456    }
457
458    public long getStandardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset() {
459        return standardBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
460    }
461
462    // ---- Extended bolus getters ----
463
464    public int getExtendedBolusStatusId() {
465        return extendedBolusStatusId;
466    }
467
468    public int getExtendedBolusId() {
469        return extendedBolusId;
470    }
471
472    public long getExtendedBolusTimestamp() {
473        return extendedBolusTimestamp;
474    }
475
476    public Instant getExtendedBolusTimestampInstant() {
477        return Dates.fromJan12008EpochSecondsToDate(extendedBolusTimestamp);
478    }
479
480    public long getExtendedBolusDeliveredVolume() {
481        return extendedBolusDeliveredVolume;
482    }
483
484    public int getExtendedBolusEndReasonId() {
485        return extendedBolusEndReasonId;
486    }
487
488    public int getExtendedBolusSourceId() {
489        return extendedBolusSourceId;
490    }
491
492    public BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusSource getExtendedBolusSource() {
493        return BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusSource.fromId(extendedBolusSourceId);
494    }
495
496    public int getExtendedBolusTypeBitmask() {
497        return extendedBolusTypeBitmask;
498    }
499
500    public Set<BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusType> getExtendedBolusTypes() {
501        return BolusDeliveryHistoryLog.BolusType.fromBitmask(extendedBolusTypeBitmask);
502    }
503
504    public long getExtendedBolusRequestedVolume() {
505        return extendedBolusRequestedVolume;
506    }
507
508    public long getExtendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset() {
509        return extendedBolusSecondsSincePumpReset;
510    }
511
512    /**
513     * Duration of the extended bolus in seconds.
514     */
515    public long getExtendedBolusDuration() {
516        return extendedBolusDuration;
517    }
518}
